allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: assign reporter as Test Case assignee and improve Test Execution deduplication logging

- Set reporter of original Jira issue as assignee when creating Test Case
- Mark existing Test Executions with _wasExisting flag for per-execution log messages
- Return skippedExecutions count from ensureTestExecutions\(\)
- Show individual log entry per Test Execution \(created vs already existing\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
